# SaaS Master Enterprises

> SaaS Master Enterprises builds enterprise-grade AI platforms for modern businesses.

## Company

- **Name:** SaaS Master Enterprises
- **Location:** Woodbury, Minnesota, USA
- **Contact:** dorrian@saas-master.com
- **Website:** https://saas-master.com

## Products

### Agent Forge
- **URL:** https://agent-forge.app
- **Description:** Build, deploy, and monetize AI agents in minutes. Visual agent builder with voice capabilities and one-click deployment.
- **Categories:** AI Agents, No-Code AI, Voice AI

### Vigil
- **URL:** https://vigilplatform.ai
- **Description:** Enterprise AI business intelligence that never sleeps. Real-time analytics and AI-powered insights with enterprise-grade security.
- **Categories:** Enterprise AI, Business Intelligence, Analytics

### LaunchFlow
- **URL:** https://launchflow.dev
- **Description:** Launch and optimize your apps with AI-powered App Store Optimization. Keyword tracking, review monitoring, and AI-generated optimization suggestions.
- **Categories:** App Store Optimization, ASO, AI Analytics

### Nexus Studio (Coming Soon)
- **Description:** AI-powered creative production suite. Video editing, text-to-speech, auto captioning, and multi-language dubbing.
- **Categories:** AI Video, Creative Tools, Content Production
